DEPT. 2, JUDGE CHOPPELAS, CSR MAUREEN BRADY, CLERK E.MONTI 9:30 AM C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTF PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFT NOT PRESENT.PLTF SWORN FOR TRIAL. PLTF'S PRAYER: RENT/DAM- AGES $1387.00,FROM 7-1-93 THROUGH 10-31-93, COURT COSTS $80.00. EXH. #1 NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL EXH. #2 THREE DAY NOTICE THESE EXHIBITS ARE ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE BY THE COURT, UN- MARKED, AS THEY ARE PART OF THE COURT FILE. THE COURT AWARDS JUDGMENT FOR THE PLTF AS FOLLOWS: REST & POSS OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 88 SIXTH ST. #210. RENT/ DAMAGES FOR $1387.00 & COURT COSTS OF $80.00. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY. CASE SUBMITTED. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEYS, GARY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DELTA HOTEL, 88-6TH ST. RM. 210 SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,387.00 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,467.00, LEASE FORFEITED
